name: run_tests
description: Run tests with auto-detected framework, multiple test paths, --brief to strip noise, --stash to handle uncommitted changes, and --head/--tail to truncate output.

parameters.name: --dir=DIR
parameters.description: Working directory to cd into before running tests

parameters.name: test_paths
parameters.description: One or more test files, directories, or dotted module paths (space-separated)

parameters.name: --testtools
parameters.description: Force Python testtools.run with dotted module paths

parameters.name: --build-command=CMD
parameters.description: Run a build command before tests

parameters.name: --brief
parameters.description: Strip config/coverage noise, show only failures + summary; works for pytest and Go tests

parameters.name: --head=N
parameters.description: Show only first N lines of output (truncates after N lines)

parameters.name: --tail=N
parameters.description: Show only last N lines of output

parameters.name: --stash
parameters.description: Stash uncommitted changes before running tests and pop them after

examples.expected: Runs 3 testtools modules in one step, saving 2 steps vs sequential calls

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses cd+stash+test+pip+tail into 1 step per framework; --brief strips stdout/stderr/log noise saving observation tokens.
